title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week brought significant improvements to OpsPal's automation capabilities with a new skills catalog containing 683 automated skills across 25 categories, plus enhanced Salesforce deployment reliability. We also fixed several platform issues that improve overall stability and resolved critical connectivity problems affecting HubSpot integrations.

entries.headline: New command to promote automation skills
Expanded skills catalog now includes 683 automation skills across 25 categories
Enhanced data import reliability and authentication improvements
Salesforce deployments now recover automatically from errors
Better Salesforce setup detection and deployment validation
details: Automatically detects country and state picklist configurations
Validates deployment paths before executing changes
Improved retry logic for failed operations

entries.headline: Salesforce multi-step deployments now run more reliably
Restored HubSpot automation capabilities that stopped working
